languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, Янур — отличный солдат и командир. Но его навыки незаменимы для всего полка. Батошски найдет нового интенданта, а вот столь искусного разведчика и охотника — нет. Он не должен рисковать собой".

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, Янур — отличный солдат и командир. Но его навыки незаменимы для всего полка. Батошски найдет нового интенданта, а вот столь искусного разведчика и охотника — нет. Он не должен рисковать собой".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."

languages.text: 「御殿様、ジャヌールは優秀な兵士であり、指揮官でもあります。しかし、彼の能力は連隊全体に欠かせません。バトシュスキーは新しい会計士を見つけられますが、彼ほど優れた偵察兵や狩人を見つけることはできません。彼は危険を冒してはいけません」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."

traits.locale_text: 「御殿様、ジャンヌルは優秀な兵士であり、指揮官でもあります。しかし、彼の能力は連隊全体に欠かせません。バトシュスキーは新しい会計士を見つけられますが、彼ほど優れた偵察兵や狩人を見つけることはできません。彼は危険を冒してはいけません。」

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Janur iyi bir asker ve komutandır. Fakat yetenekleri, tüm alay için çok kıymetlidir. Batoshski, yeni bir levazım subayı bulabilir ama bu kadar yetenekli bir izci ve avcı bulamaz. Kendini tehlikeye atmamalı."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Janur iyi bir asker ve komutandır. Fakat yetenekleri, tüm alay için çok kıymetlidir. Batoshski, yeni bir levazım subayı bulabilir ama bu kadar yetenekli bir izci ve avcı bulamaz. Kendini tehlikeye atmamalı."

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, Janur es buen soldado y comandante, pero sus habilidades son indispensables para el regimiento. Batoshski puede encontrar otro intendente, pero no otro explorador y cazador de su nivel. No podemos permitir que se ponga en peligro».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, Janur es buen soldado y comandante, pero sus habilidades son indispensables para el regimiento. Batoshski puede encontrar otro intendente, pero no otro explorador y cazador de su nivel. No podemos permitir que se ponga en peligro».

languages.text: “大人，雅努尔是个优秀的士兵和指挥者，他对整个军团来说是不可或缺的存在。巴托什斯基能再找一个军需官，但找不到他这么老练的侦察兵和猎人。他不能冒这个险。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."

traits.locale_text: “大人，雅努尔是个优秀的士兵和指挥者，他对整个军团来说是不可或缺的存在。巴托什斯基能再找一个军需官，但找不到他这么老练的侦察兵和猎人。他不能冒这个险。”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, Janur est un excellent soldat et un commandant chevronné, mais ses compétences sont indispensables à l'ensemble du régiment. Un quartier-maître est facilement remplaçable, ce qui n'est pas le cas du meilleur de nos éclaireurs et chasseurs. Il ne doit pas risquer sa vie. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, Janur est un excellent soldat et un commandant chevronné, mais ses compétences sont indispensables à l'ensemble du régiment. Un quartier-maître est facilement remplaçable, ce qui n'est pas le cas du meilleur de nos éclaireurs et chasseurs. Il ne doit pas risquer sa vie. »

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Janur ist ein guter Soldat und Kommandeur. Aber seine Fähigkeiten sind für das gesamte Regiment unersetzbar. Batoshski findet gewiss eine neue Quartiermeisterin, aber keinen so fähigen Kundschafter und Jäger. Er darf nicht sein Leben riskieren."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Janur is a fine soldier and commander. But his skills are indispensable to the entire regiment. Batoshski can find a new quartermaster, but not so skilled a scout and hunter. He must not risk himself."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Janur ist ein guter Soldat und Kommandeur. Aber seine Fähigkeiten sind für das gesamte Regiment unersetzbar. Batoshski findet gewiss eine neue Quartiermeisterin, aber keinen so fähigen Kundschafter und Jäger. Er darf nicht sein Leben riskieren."
